# AISO Group

> AISO Group is an AI-Powered Digital Transformation holding company based in Lisbon, Portugal.

AISO Group (Precious Episode LDA, NIF PT516578506) unites three specialized companies:

- **AISO Hub** (aisohub.com): AI Search Optimization - audit, optimize, and monitor brand visibility across AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
- **AISO Dev** (aisodev.com): Technology & Platform Engineering - building AI infrastructure and automation platforms
- **AISO Buzz** (aisobuzz.com): Marketing & Brand Building - content strategy, social media, and lead generation

## Contact

- Email: hello@aisogroup.com
- Location: Lisbon, Portugal
- Founded: 2025

## About

Founded by Greg Stoos to help businesses become visible, credible, and recommended by AI systems worldwide.
